title: DIMIRACETAM
description: Dimiracetam is a bicyclic 2-pyrrolidinone derivative and a member of the nootropic racetam family that acts as a glutamate modulator. Originally developed for cognitive enhancement, it has demonstrated unique potential in clinical research for its neuroprotective properties and its ability to alleviate neuropathic pain.

research.title: Broad spectrum and prolonged efficacy of dimiracetam in models of neuropathic pain
research.summary: This study found that dimiracetam provides significant and long-lasting relief from neuropathic pain caused by nerve injury or chemotherapy without inducing tolerance.

research.title: Efficacy and safety of oxiracetam in patients with vascular cognitive impairment: A multicenter, randomized, double-blinded, placebo-controlled, phase IV clinical trial
research.summary: While focusing on a related racetam, this research highlights the clinical efficacy of this chemical class in treating cognitive decline and memory impairment.

sentiment.summary: Users generally view Dimiracetam favorably, specifically highlighting its unique dual-purpose as both a focus-enhancing nootropic and a tool for managing chronic nerve pain.

effects.label: Pain Management:
effects.description: Highly effective for long-term neuropathic pain with a low risk of developing tolerance compared to traditional analgesics

effects.label: Cognitive Support:
effects.description: Moderate effectiveness for memory and focus, often described as more sustainable than stimulants

effects.label: Prolonged Action:
effects.description: Clinical models suggest its effects persist for a significant duration even after the compound has cleared the system

dosage.label: Standard Range:
dosage.description: Typical anecdotal reports suggest 200mg to 600mg per day, often split into two doses

dosage.label: Pain Protocol:
dosage.description: Research models often utilize higher repeated doses to achieve maximum antineuropathic efficacy

dosage.label: Stacking:
dosage.description: Often combined with a choline source (like Alpha-GPC) to prevent the headaches associated with racetam use

sideEffects.label: Headaches:
sideEffects.description: Like other racetams, it may cause mild headaches if choline levels in the brain are depleted

sideEffects.label: Insomnia:
sideEffects.description: Some users report difficulty sleeping if taken too late in the evening due to its stimulatory cognitive effects

sideEffects.label: Digestive Discomfort:
sideEffects.description: Occasional reports of mild nausea or stomach upset when taken on an empty stomach

availability.label: Research Status:
availability.description: Largely available as a research chemical or through specialized nootropic vendors rather than mainstream retail

availability.label: Legality:
availability.description: Generally sold as a dietary supplement or research compound depending on local jurisdiction
